title: Zephyr: Missing unified hybrid Router abstraction (spec 7.2)
description: Same gap as Rust. Zephyr has rpl/ and routing/announce.c but no unified router combining address classification, gradient lookup, LOADng discovery, pending queue, DTN buffer. Reference: python/src/lichen/routing/router.py
close_reason:
Implemented unified hybrid Router abstraction (spec 7.2) for Zephyr:
- gradient.h/c: Unified gradient table with LRU eviction, RFC 1982 seq comparison
- router.h/c: Hybrid routing decision engine with address classification, gradient lookup, RPL parent routing, pending queue, optional DTN buffer, GPSR support
- Accessor interfaces for RPL and LOADng to decouple from specific implementations
- Updated CMakeLists.txt and Kconfig with router configuration options
